title: Pilot Juice Space Smash Set
summary: Samples and photos of the neon Pilot Juice space smash set
content:
I posted in July about the Pilot Juice Planet Labyrinth set which are neon editions of the juice line. I had mentioned there was a second set called Space Smash and I picked those up this week.

The purple is great, blue is decent, but the yellow is nearly impossible to read - I thought the green was bad but yellow is much worse for readability.
